fields.bert_adaptations: multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder, jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers, Masked Language Model (MLM) and Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) pre-training objectives
fields.inherited_components: multi-layer Transformer encoder stack, multi-head self-attention mechanism, Transformer block notation (L, H, A)

markdown:
1. BERT explicitly cites Vaswani et al. (2017) ("Attention Is All You Need") as the source of its core Transformer architecture, stating its model is "a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017)" and referring readers to that work for background on the model architecture. [1]
2. BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder "almost identical to the original" implementation of Vaswani et al. (2017), using the same self-attention layers, Transformer blocks, and notation L (number of layers/Transformer blocks), H (hidden size), and A (number of self-attention heads). [1][2][3][4]
3. BERT adapts the Transformer architecture by using only the encoder stack as a "multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder," jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers, and pre-training with the Masked Language Model (MLM) objective together with a Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) task. [5][6][7][8]

Unresolved from the available corpus evidence:
- transformer_architecture

Sources
[1] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3
[2] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3
[3] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3.2 Fine-tuning BERT, p. 5
[4] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 1 Introduction, p. 1
[5] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, Abstract, p. 1
[6] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 1 Introduction, p. 1
[7] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 5.1 Effect of Pre-training Tasks, p. 8
[8] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3.1 Pre-training BERT, p. 4
